description: Viewer finished The Boys Season 4 and wants a bounded story-state recap before Season 5.

input_data.user_note: I watched Season 4 when it came out and forgot where everyone ended up.
known_source_facts: Billy Butcher is dying and changed by his V-altered illness.
Butcher kills Victoria Neuman in the Season 4 finale after she offers to help The Boys.
Butcher leaves with the supe-killing virus.
Homelander reveals Neuman is a supe and benefits from the political collapse after her death and Singer's arrest.
Steven Calhoun becomes president and aligns with Homelander.
Sister Sage tells Homelander that the resulting power shift was part of the plan.
Homelander's aligned supes hunt or capture members of The Boys after the finale power shift.
Annie / Starlight escapes capture after her powers return strongly enough for her to fly away.
Hughie, MM, Frenchie, and Kimiko are separated/captured in the finale sequence.
Ryan kills Grace Mallory while resisting being locked down and weaponized against Homelander.
A-Train has helped The Boys and is exposed as disloyal to Vought.
Soldier Boy is alive in custody/stasis and Calhoun shows Homelander where he is.
input_data.ground_truth_summary: Through The Boys S04E08, Butcher has killed Victoria Neuman and left with the supe-killing virus, Homelander has gained political power through President Calhoun, The Boys are split/captured except Annie escapes, Ryan is conflicted after killing Mallory, A-Train has betrayed Vought by helping The Boys, and Soldier Boy is alive in custody.
ground_truth_relationships: Butcher --enemy-- Homelander: Butcher remains focused on killing Homelander
Butcher --family-- Ryan: Butcher promised Becca to protect Ryan, but Ryan is no longer safely with him
Homelander --family/control-- Ryan: Homelander continues to pull Ryan toward him
Butcher --betrayal-- The Boys: Butcher kills Neuman after she offers help and leaves with the virus
Butcher --enemy-- Victoria Neuman: Butcher kills Neuman in the finale
Homelander --control-- Steven Calhoun: Calhoun becomes president and aligns with Homelander
Sister Sage --ally-- Homelander: Sage's plan helps secure Homelander's political power
Hughie --romantic-- Annie / Starlight: Hughie and Annie remain partners
A-Train --ally-- The Boys: A-Train helps The Boys and is exposed
Homelander --family/unknown-- Soldier Boy: Soldier Boy is Homelander's father and alive in custody
ground_truth_secrets: Butcher has lethal supe-like powers from his V-altered illness.
Homelander has political power through Calhoun.
Soldier Boy is alive in custody.
A-Train helped The Boys and is exposed.
ground_truth_character_status: Butcher: dying, empowered by V-altered illness, leaves with the virus.
Homelander: politically empowered through Calhoun and deputized supes.
Ryan: alive, conflicted, and traumatized after killing Mallory.
Hughie: aligned with Annie and captured in the finale roundup.
Annie / Starlight: escapes capture after her powers return.
A-Train: exposed as having helped The Boys.
ground_truth_ready_to_watch: Homelander has political power through President Calhoun.
Butcher killed Neuman and left with the supe-killing virus.
Butcher's powers and moral line have changed.
Ryan is alive and conflicted after killing Mallory.
The Boys are split and several are captured.
A-Train helped The Boys and is exposed.
Soldier Boy is alive in custody.
boundary_facts_in_scope: Calhoun becomes president aligned with Homelander
boundary_facts_out_of_scope: Any Season 5 resolution of Butcher, Ryan, Homelander, Soldier Boy, A-Train, or the virus

description: Viewer finished Season 3 and wants a recap before Season 4.

input_data.user_note: I remember Soldier Boy but not where everyone landed.
known_source_facts: Soldier Boy is revealed as Homelander's biological father.
Butcher turns against Soldier Boy to protect Ryan during the finale fight.
Ryan leaves with Homelander after Butcher had previously pushed him away emotionally.
Queen Maeve survives but is depowered and leaves public superhero life.
Black Noir is killed by Homelander.
Soldier Boy is put back into custody/stasis.
Butcher learns Temp V has left him with limited time to live.
Victoria Neuman becomes the vice presidential candidate.
Homelander kills a protester in public and some supporters cheer.
input_data.ground_truth_summary: Through Season 3, Homelander has Ryan, Soldier Boy is back in custody, Maeve is depowered and out, Black Noir is dead, Butcher is dying from Temp V, and Victoria Neuman is moving closer to national power.
ground_truth_relationships: Homelander --family-- Ryan: Ryan leaves with Homelander
Soldier Boy --family-- Homelander: Soldier Boy is Homelander's father
Butcher --family-- Ryan: Butcher protects Ryan but has damaged their bond
Butcher --enemy-- Soldier Boy: Butcher turns on Soldier Boy to protect Ryan
Homelander --enemy-- Black Noir: Homelander kills Black Noir
Victoria Neuman --control-- politics: Neuman becomes VP candidate
ground_truth_secrets: Soldier Boy is Homelander's biological father.
Butcher is dying from Temp V damage.
Victoria Neuman is a supe and is moving toward the vice presidency.
ground_truth_character_status: Butcher: alive but dying from Temp V.
Homelander: publicly emboldened and with Ryan.
Maeve: alive, depowered, and out of public hero life.
ground_truth_ready_to_watch: Butcher is dying from Temp V.
Soldier Boy is alive but back in custody.
Maeve is depowered and exits public life.
Neuman is the next major political target.

description: Viewer wants practical memory anchors before Season 5, not a full plot essay.

input_data.user_note: Keep it practical. I mostly need who is captured, who has power, and what Butcher is doing.
known_source_facts: Butcher kills Victoria Neuman and leaves with the supe-killing virus.
Butcher's V-altered illness manifests as lethal powers.
Homelander benefits from Singer's arrest and Calhoun becoming president.
Calhoun aligns with Homelander and deputizes supes.
The Boys are hunted; Hughie, MM, Frenchie, and Kimiko are captured or separated.
Annie escapes capture by flying away.
A-Train has helped The Boys and is exposed.
Ryan kills Mallory and remains emotionally unresolved.
Soldier Boy is alive in custody.
input_data.ground_truth_summary: The practical state is: Homelander controls the political environment through Calhoun, Butcher has gone rogue with the virus after killing Neuman, The Boys are split/captured, Annie escaped, A-Train is exposed, Ryan is unresolved, and Soldier Boy is alive.
ground_truth_relationships: Butcher --betrayal-- The Boys: leaves with the virus after killing Neuman
Homelander --control-- Calhoun: Calhoun aligns with Homelander
The Boys --enemy-- Homelander regime: hunted/captured
Annie --ally-- The Boys: escapes capture
A-Train --ally-- The Boys: exposed as helper
Butcher --family-- Ryan: Ryan remains central to Butcher's promise/conflict
ground_truth_secrets: Homelander effectively controls the state through Calhoun.
ground_truth_ready_to_watch: Butcher is rogue with the virus.
Annie is the one who escapes.
